result.status_detail: notion AI accessible (logged in) — new chat URL generated (notion.so/chat?t=34f7e0fa91d480d7a58900a99f4d0c96&wfv=chat). User prompt rendered in chat as user bubble, but AI response area remained EMPTY for 15s+ (silent hang). No warning, no answer, no error. Confirms NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE / H2 multi-stream classification — APF interaction with notion's H2 multi-stream pattern yields silent block.
result.send_method_note: First Type+Enter attempt: input cleared but no message rendered; explicit Click + retry second time succeeded (user bubble appeared)
result.test_progression: page_load=OK, login=OK, ai_chat_open=OK, prompt_send=OK (after retry), ai_response=SILENT_HANG
result.verdict_diff_from_previous: Same architectural issue confirmed — H2 multi-stream (multiple parallel streams) prevents APF from injecting response, AI server output also blocked from rendering = silent block

notes: Batch F-11 notion AI. User prompt visible but AI response empty — silent hang. notion.so uses HTTP/2 multi-stream pattern where AI completion arrives via parallel streams; APF response envelope cannot be assembled correctly. To fix: separate H2 multi-stream handler or pre-completion intercept point.
